title: pilosella permutata
intro: Pilosella permutata, also known as Sheep's Sorrel or Field Sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Pilosella permutata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
